nasb.text: Then he will pray to God, and He will accept him, That he may see His face with joy, And He may restore His righteousness to man.

esv.text: then man  prays to God, and he accepts him; he sees his face with a shout of joy, and he restores to man his righteousness.

cnv.text: 他向　神祈求，　神就喜悅他， 他也歡呼著朝見　神的面， 人又恢復自己的義。

ccb.text: 他向上帝祷告时必蒙悦纳， 他欢呼着朝见上帝， 再度被祂视为义人。
